Professional Fees.broad: gmail-2024-11-10-ip-invoice: Invoice from Whitmore & Associates — IP dispute advisory, Matter WA-2024-IP-441. Work performed October–November in preparation for USPTO proceedings. Fee: $27,500. CFO approved 10 November.
Professional Fees.narrow: gmail-2024-11-10-ip-background: Context from GC — Whitmore engaged in August to defend against patent claim from Vantec Corp. Expected total matter cost $45–55K over 6 months. November invoice is second billing; first $12K was absorbed within budget in September/October. Remaining $8–18K expected in Q1 2025.

Legal & Compliance.broad: gmail-2024-11-20-exec-legal: Invoice from Heron Legal — employment agreements for two new VP hires (VP Engineering and VP Sales). $1,200 flat fee per board-approved engagement. CFO approved.
Legal & Compliance.narrow: gmail-2024-11-20-vp-hires: Two VP employment agreement reviews — standard work, no unusual terms. Heron Legal have a fixed $600/agreement rate under our MSA.

Professional Fees.broad: legal-slack-2024-11-11: Heads up — Whitmore invoice hit today, $27.5K for IP defence work. This is the large one we've been expecting. CFO approved, posted to Professional Fees. Total matter spend so far: $39.5K of ~$50K estimate.
Professional Fees.narrow: legal-slack-2024-11-11: IP dispute context: Vantec filed patent infringement claim in September. Our outside counsel (Whitmore) assesses strong defence. USPTO proceedings begin Q1 2025. Remaining costs will be in Q1.

Legal & Compliance.broad: hr-slack-2024-11-20: VP Engineering and VP Sales offers accepted. Employment agreements went to Heron Legal for review this month — standard process. $1,200 total.
Legal & Compliance.narrow: hr-slack-2024-11-20: Both VP offers now countersigned. Heron invoice approved. No other legal matters in Legal & Compliance this month.
